subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Aid Thy handmaiden to perform every deed that is acceptable at the threshold of Thine oneness. Verily, Thou art the All-Bountiful, the Most Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب وفق امتک علی کل عمل مقبول فی باب احدیتک انک انت الکریم الرحیم
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power of prayer, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
